entities.name: RURAL LABOR MARKET
entities.description: The market for labor in rural areas, currently undergoing profound structural transformation

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector of farming and crop production, experiencing a decline in employment

entities.name: NON-FARM SECTOR
entities.description: Economic activities in rural areas other than agriculture, acting as a driver of rural development

entities.name: RURAL TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of changing rural production and employment structures

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on rural non-farm employment is conducted

entities.name: LABOR SCARCITY
entities.description: The shortage of available labor which constrains agricultural production

entities.name: FARM WAGE
entities.description: The payment made to agricultural laborers, which is rising due to labor scarcity

entities.name: INFRASTRUCTURE AND CONSTRUCTION
entities.description: Key components of the non-farm sector driving employment growth

entities.name: TRANSPORTATION AND COMMUNICATION
entities.description: Factors that have improved and contributed to the change in employment structure

entities.name: LITERACY
entities.description: A driver of changes in the rural employment structure

entities.name: GOVERNMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Policy-driven initiatives influencing the rural employment structure

entities.name: SC
entities.description: Scheduled Castes, a social group with increased dependence on rural non-farm employment

entities.name: MIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of rural labor to cities, especially by male workers

entities.name: CITIES
entities.description: Urban areas that attract migrant workers from rural regions

entities.name: LABOR SAVING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies and machines designed to mitigate labor scarcity

entities.name: INCLUSIVE FARM MECHANIZATION PROGRAM
entities.description: Programs aimed at increasing mechanization, specifically for women and youth

entities.name: COST OF PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total expense incurred in agricultural production, pushed higher by rising wages and input costs

entities.name: SKILL AUGMENTATION
entities.description: The process of improving skills through capacity building programs
